initial_candidates.sql:
WITH store_avg AS (
    SELECT
        sr.sr_store_sk,
        AVG(total_return_amt) AS avg_return_amt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            sr.sr_store_sk,
            sr.sr_customer_sk,
            SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
        FROM store_returns sr
        JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
        WHERE d.d_year = 2000
          AND s.s_state = 'TN'
        GROUP BY sr.sr_store_sk, sr.sr_customer_sk
    ) t
    GROUP BY sr_store_sk
),
high_return_customers AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_customer_id,
        sr.sr_store_sk,
        SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN customer c ON sr.sr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2000
      AND s.s_state = 'TN'
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, sr.sr_store_sk
    HAVING SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) > 1.2 * (
        SELECT avg_return_amt
        FROM store_avg sa
        WHERE sa.sr_store_sk = sr.sr_store_sk
    )
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM high_return_customers
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH store_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        sr.sr_store_sk,
        AVG(total_return_amt) AS avg_return_amt
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            sr.sr_store_sk,
            sr.sr_customer_sk,
            SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
        FROM store_returns sr
        JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
        WHERE d.d_year = 2000
          AND s.s_state = 'TN'
        GROUP BY sr.sr_store_sk, sr.sr_customer_sk
    ) AS customer_store_totals
    GROUP BY sr_store_sk
),
high_return_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_id,
        sr.sr_store_sk,
        SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN customer c ON sr.sr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN store_avg sa ON sr.sr_store_sk = sa.sr_store_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2000
      AND s.s_state = 'TN'
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_id, sr.sr_store_sk, sa.avg_return_amt
    HAVING SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) > 1.2 * sa.avg_return_amt
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM high_return_customers
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH store_customer_returns AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        s.s_store_sk,
        SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN customer c ON sr.sr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2000
      AND s.s_state = 'TN'
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, s.s_store_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        s_store_sk,
        AVG(total_return_amt) AS avg_return_amt
    FROM store_customer_returns
    GROUP BY s_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    scr.c_customer_id
FROM store_customer_returns scr
JOIN store_averages sa ON scr.s_store_sk = sa.s_store_sk
WHERE scr.total_return_amt > 1.2 * sa.avg_return_amt
ORDER BY scr.c_customer_id
LIMIT 100

WITH store_return_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_customer_sk,
        c.c_customer_id,
        s.s_store_sk,
        SUM(sr.sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amt
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN customer c ON sr.sr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2000
      AND s.s_state = 'TN'
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, s.s_store_sk
),
store_avg_returns AS (
    SELECT 
        s_store_sk,
        AVG(total_return_amt) AS avg_return_amt
    FROM store_return_totals
    GROUP BY s_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    srt.c_customer_id
FROM store_return_totals srt
JOIN store_avg_returns sar ON srt.s_store_sk = sar.s_store_sk
WHERE srt.total_return_amt > 1.2 * sar.avg_return_amt
ORDER BY srt.c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN customer c ON sr.sr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN store s ON sr.sr_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2000
      AND s.s_state = 'TN'
    GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, s.s_store_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        s_store_sk,
        AVG(total_return_amt) AS avg_return_amt
    FROM store_customer_totals
    GROUP BY s_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    sct.c_customer_id
FROM store_customer_totals sct
JOIN store_averages sa ON sct.s_store_sk = sa.s_store_sk
WHERE sct.total_return_amt > 1.2 * sa.avg_return_amt
ORDER BY sct.c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;
